narrative_beat: Wide linha do tempo gravada em pedra com marcos iluminados

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a horizontal timeline carved into a massive stone wall, with four dates marked by golden glowing points: 10NOV, 15NOV, 17MAR, and one future point still dark, connected by an engraved gold line
subject.focal_point: the golden glowing date markers along the timeline
subject.secondary: City skyline in monochrome behind the stone wall.
props: carved timeline with golden date points

environment.location: a monumental stone wall in a city plaza

composition.foreground: golden date points and carved timeline in warm tones

lighting.key_light: golden hour lateral light illuminating the stone wall

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: chronological fatality, dates written in stone

symbolism.primary: the timeline of events — publication, sale, exit — all planned
symbolism.secondary: stone carving as permanence of the plan

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
